failedAssertions.reason: Binary-path and relay-URL configurability checks passed, but the missing-relay-config case does not fail fast: test_missing_relay_url_warns_but_allows_degraded_mode passed, showing the wrapper continues in degraded mode instead of exiting non-zero with a clear error as required.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that manual relay-api websocket checks should run `node --input-type=module` from `/data/dl/fschannel/server`, and that `POST /sessions/:id/input` requires a schema-valid payload such as `{type:"prompt",content:"..."}` rather than a bare `content` field.
